summary: Validated requested backend + frontend changes on public URL: passcode hint removal on login screen, back navigation, cloud placeholder fallback, autosuggest after save, invoice number fallback generation, and A4 print behavior.

integration_issues.issue: Invoice number can appear blank for a short moment immediately after login before async reserve-number call completes.

action_items: Optional UX hardening: show loading placeholder/skeleton for document number until reserve-number API resolves.
If security policy requires, remove passcode value from failed-login toast message text as well (currently still mentions 7538 in error toast).
critical_code_review_comments: Cloud fallback implementation is correct for placeholder Supabase credentials: SUPABASE_ENABLED guard safely routes to MongoDB paths.
Login page no longer contains static passcode hint text; however failed-login toast still reveals passcode value, which may be undesirable for production security posture.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_UI_AUTOSUGGEST_26 customer via UI and multiple TEST_ prefixed backend records through pytest save-bill flows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested feature checks are passing on public deployment. Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_billing_api.py for regression. Focus next on optional security/UX polish only.
rca of the issue: RCA (minor): transient blank invoice number is caused by asynchronous bootstrap order (settings/cloud fetch + reserve number). It resolves after API response; adding explicit loading state for document number would prevent temporary empty display.
